description: SendCanary DKIM setup (3 CNAMEs): publishes three DKIM CNAMEs for providers that rotate multiple selectors - typically SendGrid (s1, s2, em), Mailchimp's multi-region CNAME bundle, or other SaaS senders that need a full three-record set up front. DKIM is required for DMARC alignment and improves deliverability. SendCanary (https://sendcanary.com) is an email authentication platform that monitors DMARC reports, detects spoofing, and automates DNS remediation for domain owners.
variableDescription: selector1 / target1: first DKIM CNAME. selector2 / target2: second. selector3 / target3: third. Hosts become %selectorN%._domainkey.<your-domain>.
